name: Dimension Explosion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>次</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>元</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>誘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>爆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Return 1 face-up Fusion Monster you control to the Extra Deck. Both players select up to 2 of their monsters that are removed from play, and Special Summon them.
eff: Return 1 face-up Fusion Monster you control to the Extra Deck. Both players select up to 2 of their monsters that are removed from play, and Special Summon them.

action: Returns from field to Extra Deck for cost
summoning: Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the opponent's field
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
